title: The Goofy Bozos Experience Lite
description: This is truly the second greatest modpack ever made by VEMA, one of the members of the Goofy Bozos. New one is better tho go check it out once it's out.
body:
(New version under the old name is coming sometime, this is an old version) **The Goofy Bozos Experience Lite** is the modpack used by **Goofy Bozos** in their (two episode long) video series on YouTube centering around playing this modpack. It is a "Minecraft 2.0" esque modpack with some more interesting mods thrown in to shake things up a bit. Hosted on Modrinth primarily to be able to show people what we are playing and to let them experience it for themselves too. Additionally it works as an easy way for us to keep a version catalogue while the modpack is being developed.
Oukei enough yapstering. Let's get to it. You can go to the Goofy Bozos channel and there will be some great content to watch there. However be warned, for your ears may not exist after viewing our material. The Goofy Bozos channel is for sturdy eared individuals only okay let's stop talking before someone gets offended....

![Goofy Bozos Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d27bb9cf7361ec28f2f893682b37ca21982b7d44.jpeg)

[You can watch the greatest videos through this link](https://www.youtube.com/@goofyahhbozomen)
